desc: Build one verified raw object containing exact B0 m1n1+Image+J614s DTB+Alpine RAM distro, reparse offsets/entry/size/hashes with ticket 080's verifier, and prepare an independently reviewed one-shot tethered test that chainloads only this object (no linux.py or second payload). Stop before creating/running the rig ticket. Experiment 6 in docs/BOOTABLE_BUILD_EXPERIMENTS.md.
author: codex
